hints.tua, consilia: 'tua' is a possessive adjective ('your') and 'consilia' is a noun ('plans')
hints.Patere, consilia: 'consilia' is a noun (neuter plural) meaning 'plans', not a verb
hints.tua, sentis: 'tua' is a possessive adjective, not a verb

hints.to suffer: 'to suffer' is 'pati' (deponent) — 'patere' comes from 'pateo' (to lie open)
hints.to obey: 'to obey' is 'parere' — similar but different verb from 'patere'

hints.Present indicative: 'Patere' could be 2nd person singular present passive, but here with 'sentis' it functions as infinitive in indirect speech
hints.Present imperative: Imperative would be a command — but 'non sentis' (you don't perceive) governs 'patere' as an infinitive
hints.Imperfect subjunctive: Imperfect subjunctive would be 'paterent' or similar — 'patere' is an infinitive here

hints.patior, pati, passus sum: These are the parts of 'pati' (to suffer) — a deponent verb
hints.paro, parare, paravi, paratum: These are the parts of 'parare' (to prepare)
hints.pareo, parere, parui, paritum: These are the parts of 'parere' (to obey)

hints.Present subjunctive: Present subjunctive would be 'sentias' — 'sentis' is indicative

hints.mitto, mittere, misi, missum: These are the parts of 'mittere' (to send)
hints.audio, audire, audivi, auditum: These are the parts of 'audire' (to hear) — same conjugation but different verb
hints.facio, facere, feci, factum: These are the parts of 'facere' (to do/make)

hints.Nominative: Neuter plural nominative is the same form, but 'consilia' is the subject of the infinitive 'patere' in indirect statement — functioning as accusative
hints.Ablative: Ablative plural would be 'consiliis' — 'consilia' is accusative
hints.Vocative: One does not address 'plans' — 'consilia' is accusative

hints.1st: 1st declension plural would be 'consiliae' — 'consilium, -ii' is 2nd declension neuter
hints.3rd: 3rd declension neuter plurals can end in -a, but 'consilium, -ii' is 2nd declension
hints.4th: 4th declension nouns have gen. in -us — 'consilium, -ii' is 2nd declension

translation: Do you not realize that your plans lie exposed?
